channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3706] sanity-scrub test_13 timeout
item.description:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/8d968884-fc11-11e2-9222-52540035b04c

stack trace from OSS:

04:58:19:INFO: task mount.lustre:15552 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
04:58:19:"echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
04:58:19:mount.lustre  D 0000000000000000     0 15552  15551 0x00000080
04:58:19: ffff880064c73558 0000000000000082 ffff880064c73528 00000000bdc11593
04:58:19: ffff880064c73578 ffffffffa03d7faf ffffffffa0de1a2f ffffffffa0de1a2b
04:58:19: ffff88006238a638 ffff880064c73fd8 000000000000fb88 ffff88006238a638

04:58:19: [<ffffffffa03d7faf>] ? start_this_handle+0xdf/0x4a0 [jbd2]

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Patch landed to Master so closing ticket.

This is the patch:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/7534/
nasf, could you take a look? thanks.
